programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing. After the sudden death of her parents, Sara takes control of both the family and the business. She turns them into success stories, but at the cost of her own personal life. Her world revolves around her brothers, Burhan, Adnan, and Usman. Over time, Sara becomes strict and commanding. Her decisions become law inside the house. But her strongest test begins when her brothers’ personal desires rise against her authority. Soon, tensions grow and loyalties are tested. Will Sara choose her authority over her family? Will Sara’s brothers rebel against her decisions? Can Sara keep her family together? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Behkaway
programme.desc: In a world where desires blur the lines between right and wrong, one man’s pursuit of happiness sets off a chain of irreversible consequences. Zubair, a middle-aged man hardened by ego and entitlement, rules over his household with an iron hand. His wife, Zeenat, bears the weight of his injustices in silence, enduring not only his coldness but the cruelty of his mother and sister. Despite her unwavering love and devotion, Zeenat receives nothing but pain in return. But everything begins to shift when Zubair encounters Sitara, a young, captivating woman whose charm ignites a dangerous spark within him. Driven by selfish desires, Zubair makes a decision that sets off a ripple effect far beyond his control. Will Zubair abandon Zeenat after meeting Sitara? Will his decision have consequences for his family? And will Sitara prove to be a blessing or a nightmare in disguise for him? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Shaidai
programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Case No.9
programme.desc: Case No 9 is an inspiring story of Sehar, a courageous and ambitious young woman who challenges societal norms and becomes a beacon of resistance for others. Sehar, confident and driven, joins the company of Kamran, a domineering businessman feared by everyone for his egoistic and controlling nature. Unlike others, Sehar refuses to conform, letting her talent and integrity shine. Sehar’s defiance unsettles Kamran, who sets out to teach her a lesson. What follows is Sehar’s journey of redemption and resilience as she navigates the challenges thrown her way. Will Kamran succeed in teaching Sehar a lesson, or will she rise above his schemes? Can Sehar find the strength and support to overcome the odds, or will Kamran’s wealth and influence prove insurmountable? Geo and 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Behkaway
programme.desc: In a world where desires blur the lines between right and wrong, one man’s pursuit of happiness sets off a chain of irreversible consequences. Zubair, a middle-aged man hardened by ego and entitlement, rules over his household with an iron hand. His wife, Zeenat, bears the weight of his injustices in silence, enduring not only his coldness but the cruelty of his mother and sister. Despite her unwavering love and devotion, Zeenat receives nothing but pain in return. But everything begins to shift when Zubair encounters Sitara, a young, captivating woman whose charm ignites a dangerous spark within him. Driven by selfish desires, Zubair makes a decision that sets off a ripple effect far beyond his control. Will Zubair abandon Zeenat after meeting Sitara? Will his decision have consequences for his family? And will Sitara prove to be a blessing or a nightmare in disguise for him? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing. After the sudden death of her parents, Sara takes control of both the family and the business. She turns them into success stories, but at the cost of her own personal life. Her world revolves around her brothers, Burhan, Adnan, and Usman. Over time, Sara becomes strict and commanding. Her decisions become law inside the house. But her strongest test begins when her brothers’ personal desires rise against her authority. Soon, tensions grow and loyalties are tested. Will Sara choose her authority over her family? Will Sara’s brothers rebel against her decisions? Can Sara keep her family together? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Case No.9
programme.desc: Case No 9 is an inspiring story of Sehar, a courageous and ambitious young woman who challenges societal norms and becomes a beacon of resistance for others. Sehar, confident and driven, joins the company of Kamran, a domineering businessman feared by everyone for his egoistic and controlling nature. Unlike others, Sehar refuses to conform, letting her talent and integrity shine. Sehar’s defiance unsettles Kamran, who sets out to teach her a lesson. What follows is Sehar’s journey of redemption and resilience as she navigates the challenges thrown her way. Will Kamran succeed in teaching Sehar a lesson, or will she rise above his schemes? Can Sehar find the strength and support to overcome the odds, or will Kamran’s wealth and influence prove insurmountable? Geo and 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

His wife, Zeenat, bears the weight of his injustices in silence, enduring not only his coldness but the cruelty of his mother and sister. Despite her unwavering love and devotion, Zeenat receives nothing but pain in return. But everything begins to shift when Zubair encounters Sitara, a young, captivating woman whose charm ignites a dangerous spark within him. Driven by selfish desires, Zubair makes a decision that sets off a ripple effect far beyond his control. Will Zubair abandon Zeenat after meeting Sitara? Will his decision have consequences for his family? And will Sitara prove to be a blessing or a nightmare in disguise for him? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Shaidai
programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Case No.9
programme.desc: Case No 9 is an inspiring story of Sehar, a courageous and ambitious young woman who challenges societal norms and becomes a beacon of resistance for others. Sehar, confident and driven, joins the company of Kamran, a domineering businessman feared by everyone for his egoistic and controlling nature. Unlike others, Sehar refuses to conform, letting her talent and integrity shine. Sehar’s defiance unsettles Kamran, who sets out to teach her a lesson. What follows is Sehar’s journey of redemption and resilience as she navigates the challenges thrown her way. Will Kamran succeed in teaching Sehar a lesson, or will she rise above his schemes? Can Sehar find the strength and support to overcome the odds, or will Kamran’s wealth and influence prove insurmountable? Geo and 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Shaidai
programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Behkaway
programme.desc: In a world where desires blur the lines between right and wrong, one man’s pursuit of happiness sets off a chain of irreversible consequences. Zubair, a middle-aged man hardened by ego and entitlement, rules over his household with an iron hand. His wife, Zeenat, bears the weight of his injustices in silence, enduring not only his coldness but the cruelty of his mother and sister. Despite her unwavering love and devotion, Zeenat receives nothing but pain in return. But everything begins to shift when Zubair encounters Sitara, a young, captivating woman whose charm ignites a dangerous spark within him. Driven by selfish desires, Zubair makes a decision that sets off a ripple effect far beyond his control. Will Zubair abandon Zeenat after meeting Sitara? Will his decision have consequences for his family? And will Sitara prove to be a blessing or a nightmare in disguise for him? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing. After the sudden death of her parents, Sara takes control of both the family and the business. She turns them into success stories, but at the cost of her own personal life. Her world revolves around her brothers, Burhan, Adnan, and Usman. Over time, Sara becomes strict and commanding. Her decisions become law inside the house. But her strongest test begins when her brothers’ personal desires rise against her authority. Soon, tensions grow and loyalties are tested. Will Sara choose her authority over her family? Will Sara’s brothers rebel against her decisions? Can Sara keep her family together? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Pehli Barish
programme.desc: Pehli Barish is a story of love that spans generations, a tale of joy, longing, and heartbreak that seems to repeat itself. Years ago in Lahore, strangers Behzad and Maleeha met and a spark of love lit between them. But fate had other plans and tore them apart, leaving hearts scarred. Decades later, Behzad lives a settled life with a family, yet the past never truly leaves him. His son, Maani, falls for Nimra and the shadows of old heartbreak loom large. As Behzad watches history threatening to repeat itself, he must face his own past to protect Maani and perhaps confront the love he lost long ago. Will Maleeha return to Behzad’s life? Will Behzad save his son from the same heartbreak he experienced? Can Maani and Nimra’s love win against all odds? GEO & 7th Sky Entertainment presentation

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. programme.title: Behkaway
programme.desc: In a world where desires blur the lines between right and wrong, one man’s pursuit of happiness sets off a chain of irreversible consequences. Zubair, a middle-aged man hardened by ego and entitlement, rules over his household with an iron hand. His wife, Zeenat, bears the weight of his injustices in silence, enduring not only his coldness but the cruelty of his mother and sister. Despite her unwavering love and devotion, Zeenat receives nothing but pain in return. But everything begins to shift when Zubair encounters Sitara, a young, captivating woman whose charm ignites a dangerous spark within him. Driven by selfish desires, Zubair makes a decision that sets off a ripple effect far beyond his control. Will Zubair abandon Zeenat after meeting Sitara? Will his decision have consequences for his family? And will Sitara prove to be a blessing or a nightmare in disguise for him? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Shaidai
programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Rang De
programme.desc: This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar. After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage. Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance. At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn. Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Khush Naseebi
programme.desc: Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan. Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship. In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her. Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door. What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her? Geo Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Humrahi
programme.desc: What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum. Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family. Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye? Director &

programme.title: Quran Sab Ke Liye
programme.desc: Quran Sab Ke Liye

programme.title: Sara Aapi
programme.desc: Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing. After the sudden death of her parents, Sara takes control of both the family and the business. She turns them into success stories, but at the cost of her own personal life. Her world revolves around her brothers, Burhan, Adnan, and Usman. Over time, Sara becomes strict and commanding. Her decisions become law inside the house. But her strongest test begins when her brothers’ personal desires rise against her authority. Soon, tensions grow and loyalties are tested. Will Sara choose her authority over her family? Will Sara’s brothers rebel against her decisions? Can Sara keep her family together? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Hasna Mana Hai
programme.desc: There is a locality in the old city of Lahore where a young man (Host: Tabish Hashmi) has come to reside from Karachi. He is the guy who has reside in Canada too, so there is a double introduction with his name. This locality is basically a pulse of society in that almost all the segments are presents. The young man (Host) tries to understand the eccentric behavior of the people around and in doing so inadvertently offers himself to mock at. The host brings to light the fact that the morals are customs more preached than practiced while traditions are customs more practiced than preached. Gradually the host will lay bare the sensibility, psyche and sensitivity of different characters thus giving the viewers insight into the show storyline. The viewers come to know of perplexing paradoxes in the funniest way possible. In every new episode the locality is entrapped into a tricky situation which they are struggling to come out of employing street smart tactics. Notwithstanding with the fact that they condemn every other person, institution, norm and policy of the government but they exactly do contrarily to what they profess. The issues of the community revolve around small scale corruption, partisanship, political misadventures, jealousy, interference, snobbery, belittling others. They keep taunting one another using tongue in cheek remarks thus manifesting a past perennially plagued with street power struggle, political affiliation, and proclivity for easy money and predisposition to the influence. There are two different strands lurking parallel to each other in the show. The host has to entertain the audience by introducing them to socio-political anecdotes, guests, short skits, weird people, achievers, trivial but tantalizing smaller wins, social eccentricity, literary uniqueness, cultural exclusivity, musical performance, parodying, stand up comedy etc and still the other strand runs on the floor as the main subject of the show - the drama being played out by the permanent characters of the show. These permanent characters are Pehalwan, Policeman, Professor, Pehalwan's daughter, a wannabe actress, a foreign returned Pakistani, Pehalwan's wife, a shop keeper, a poet, a fatman (an idle youth), a girl singer. The show will be divided into different segments but this segmentation is not conventional. The segments will only be announced in terms of the introduction of characters or performance if need be. Usually the characters will come on their own giving an impression as if they are unwanted though the host is quite familiar with them and poses as if their forced entry is not highly welcomed.

programme.title: Behkaway
programme.desc: In a world where desires blur the lines between right and wrong, one man’s pursuit of happiness sets off a chain of irreversible consequences. Zubair, a middle-aged man hardened by ego and entitlement, rules over his household with an iron hand. His wife, Zeenat, bears the weight of his injustices in silence, enduring not only his coldness but the cruelty of his mother and sister. Despite her unwavering love and devotion, Zeenat receives nothing but pain in return. But everything begins to shift when Zubair encounters Sitara, a young, captivating woman whose charm ignites a dangerous spark within him. Driven by selfish desires, Zubair makes a decision that sets off a ripple effect far beyond his control. Will Zubair abandon Zeenat after meeting Sitara? Will his decision have consequences for his family? And will Sitara prove to be a blessing or a nightmare in disguise for him? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Shaidai
programme.desc: Shaidai is a celebration of love, a story that dares to ask what happens when the most beautiful feeling in the world turns into its greatest test. Ali Khan stands at the peak of the world others only dream of. Driven, relentless, and accustomed to getting what he wants, yet beneath that iron exterior lives a quietly devoted grandson. Miral is a self made girl who wants to do everything on her own. Vivid, sharp tongued, and fiercely certain of her own path, she moves through life with a conviction that refuses to be dimmed. Fate, indifferent to logic and timing, brings their names together. But love, it seems, has made enemies before they even knew it existed. From the shadows, forces driven by old grievances and hidden motives begin to close in, testing not just their bond but everything they believe in. What storms lie ahead in Ali and Miral’s love? Can two people who found each other against all odds hold on when the odds turn against them? And when love is pushed to its breaking point, who will be left standing? 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Case No.9
programme.desc: Case No 9 is an inspiring story of Sehar, a courageous and ambitious young woman who challenges societal norms and becomes a beacon of resistance for others. Sehar, confident and driven, joins the company of Kamran, a domineering businessman feared by everyone for his egoistic and controlling nature. Unlike others, Sehar refuses to conform, letting her talent and integrity shine. Sehar’s defiance unsettles Kamran, who sets out to teach her a lesson. What follows is Sehar’s journey of redemption and resilience as she navigates the challenges thrown her way. Will Kamran succeed in teaching Sehar a lesson, or will she rise above his schemes? Can Sehar find the strength and support to overcome the odds, or will Kamran’s wealth and influence prove insurmountable? Geo and 7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programme.title: Humnava
programme.desc: Humnava is more than just a drama it’s an emotional journey through love betrayal and resilience. It tells the story of a woman whose world is shaken when the one she trusted the most breaks her heart. But this is not just her story it reflects the pain of every person who’s ever been torn between loyalty and heartbreak. As relationships are tested and conspiracies unfold Humnava shows how real love doesn’t fade it fights it survives and it rises. Through shattered trust emotional trials and inner strength this drama is a reminder that in the end truth and sincerity always win.

programme.title: Green Entertainment Programme
programme.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programme.title: Ghulam Bashah Sundri
programme.desc: Set in a world where emotions run deep and power defines fate, Ghulam Bashah Sundri is a gripping drama of love, rivalry, and control. As relationships are tested and loyalties begin to fracture, desire turns into conflict and hearts become battlegrounds. At the center lies a compelling love triangle that draws each character into an intense emotional, social, and personal reckoning, where every choice carries consequences.

programme.title: Green Entertainment Programme
programme.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programme.title: Maa
programme.desc: Maa is an emotional family drama about love, loss, and identity. The story follows Raaha, a lively young girl raised by her grandfather, unaware of the painful truth about her birth. Abandoned by her mother Tara to protect her, and separated from her parents due to class differences and betrayal. Will Raaha uncover the truth about her past and find the love she was denied?

programme.desc: Maa is an emotional family drama about love, loss, and identity. The story follows Raaha, a lively young girl raised by her grandfather, unaware of the painful truth about her birth. Abandoned by her mother Tara to protect her, and separated from her parents due to class differences and betrayal. Will Raaha uncover the truth about her past and find the love she was denied?

programme.title: Green Entertainment Programme
programme.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programme.title: Rahguzar
programme.desc: Some paths are not chosen, they are lived. Rahguzar explores the delicate nature of relationships, where emotions collide with ego and silence becomes louder than words. When bonds are fragile, every decision matters. A single moment can reshape lives, turning love into distance and understanding into regret.

programme.title: Green Entertainment Programme
programme.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programme.title: Ghulam Bashah Sundri
programme.desc: Set in a world where emotions run deep and power defines fate, Ghulam Bashah Sundri is a gripping drama of love, rivalry, and control. As relationships are tested and loyalties begin to fracture, desire turns into conflict and hearts become battlegrounds. At the center lies a compelling love triangle that draws each character into an intense emotional, social, and personal reckoning, where every choice carries consequences.

programme.title: Green Entertainment Programme
programme.desc: Green Entertainment provides Pakistani dramas, original series, and family entertainment programming.

programme.title: Humnava
programme.desc: Humnava is more than just a drama it’s an emotional journey through love betrayal and resilience. It tells the story of a woman whose world is shaken when the one she trusted the most breaks her heart. But this is not just her story it reflects the pain of every person who’s ever been torn between loyalty and heartbreak. As relationships are tested and conspiracies unfold Humnava shows how real love doesn’t fade it fights it survives and it rises. Through shattered trust emotional trials and inner strength this drama is a reminder that in the end truth and sincerity always win.
